# Car2Fix

> Car2Fix is a family-owned automotive repair business operating two certified shops in the Newark and Linden, New Jersey area. The business serves both individual car owners (B2C) and commercial clients (B2B), including insurance companies, towing companies, car rental fleets, delivery services, and contractors with vehicle fleets.

## Business Overview

Car2Fix operates two locations in New Jersey:

- **Mechanical Shop** — 408 Carnegie Ave, Newark, NJ 07114. Open Mon–Fri 8am–6pm, Sat 8am–2pm. Handles all mechanical repairs and maintenance.
- **Body Shop** — 1420 E Elizabeth Ave, Linden, NJ 07036. Open Mon–Fri 8am–6pm. Handles collision repair, auto painting, and body work.

Phone: (607) 251-1509  
Email: info@car2fix.net  
Website: https://www.car2fix.com

## Certifications & Standards

- ASE Certified Technicians (mechanical)
- I-CAR Certified (body shop)
- OEM Certified
- EPA Compliant
- State Licensed

## Services

### Mechanical Shop (Newark, NJ)
- Engine diagnostics and repair
- Transmission repair and rebuild
- Brake service (pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, full system repair)
- Oil change (full synthetic, synthetic blend, conventional)
- Battery testing and replacement
- Cooling system repair (radiator, coolant flush, thermostat)
- A/C diagnostics and repair
- Suspension and steering (shocks, struts, alignment)
- Fuel system repair (pump, injectors, filter)
- Electrical system diagnostics and repair
- Check engine light diagnostics

### Body Shop (Linden, NJ)
- Collision repair (restoring vehicles to pre-accident condition)
- Auto painting and color matching (computer-aided)
- Paintless dent removal and traditional dent repair
- Frame straightening (computerized equipment)
- Scratch and scuff repair
- Windshield and auto glass replacement
- Body panel replacement (fenders, doors, hoods)
- Bumper repair and refinishing
- Fiberglass repair
- Headlight restoration

## Warranties

- **Body Shop:** Lifetime warranty on all body repair work
- **Mechanical Shop:** 12-month / 12,000-mile warranty on mechanical repairs

## Insurance

Car2Fix works directly with major insurance providers and handles the full claims process on behalf of the customer. Insurance partners include: GEICO, State Farm, Progressive, Allstate, Liberty Mutual, USAA.

## Target Customers

### B2B (Primary Focus)
- Insurance companies and agents
- Towing companies
- Car rental fleets (current client: Drivo — car rental operating in New York and New Jersey)
- Delivery service providers
- Car wash businesses
- Contractors with vehicle fleets

### B2C (Secondary)
- Individual vehicle owners in Newark, Linden, Elizabeth, Irvington, Union, and surrounding NJ communities

## Key Differentiators

- Family-owned and operated
- Two specialized locations (one mechanical, one body)
- ASE & I-CAR dual certification
- Lifetime warranty on body work
- Full insurance claim handling — customers bring the car, Car2Fix handles the rest
- Transparent pricing, no surprise costs
- Serves all makes and models, including commercial vans and fleet vehicles
- Established fleet maintenance partnership with Drivo (car rental, NY/NJ)
